query:
生成一张微博新闻/热点配图，横幅宽图，严格16:9比例，专业纪实摄影风格。

场景：城市黄昏的天际线，霓虹灯渐亮，行人匆匆，远处高楼反射着落日余晖，真实现场感强，光影对比戏剧化。

风格：新闻纪实感，像手机现场拍摄的高级照片，冲击力与真实并存，锐利细节，8K质感。

文字水印：
- 大标题（醒目位置，黑体或现代字体）：“城市里的安静时刻”
- 副文：“黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙”
- 水印（底部或右下）：“@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察”

画面横向延展，留白充足便于文字，整体专业高级，像真实微博热帖配图。

final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo for a Weibo news/trending post, a wide 16:9 banner image with strong documentary realism.

Style/medium: photorealistic documentary photography, handheld-feel mobile journalism aesthetic, sharp and immediate like a prize-winning street photo
Composition: wide 16:9 panoramic frame, cityscape skyline fills upper two-thirds, generous lower-left negative space reserved for headline text overlay, slight Dutch-angle energy to suggest motion
Subject: dense urban skyline with glass skyscrapers catching the last warm sunlight on their facades, silhouetted pedestrians mid-stride on a busy overpass or boulevard in the foreground
Scene/backdrop: Chinese city at golden hour transitioning to dusk — warm amber sun low on the horizon, neon signs and LED building strips beginning to glow against a deep violet-blue sky, light trails from passing vehicles
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro between warm sunset backlight and cool emerging neon; hard rim light on pedestrian silhouettes, specular reflections on glass towers, high contrast yet emotionally warm
Color palette: deep violet-blue sky as dominant field, molten amber and orange as sunset anchor on building glass, cyan and magenta neon as accent punctuation
Materials/textures: visible atmospheric haze, wet pavement reflections, glass curtain-wall grid texture on towers
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻" / "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" / "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: main title "城市里的安静时刻" in bold modern sans-serif (黑体 style), placed prominently upper-left or center-left; subtitle "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" in smaller weight below title; watermark "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" in small text bottom-right corner; all Chinese text must be legible and correctly rendered
Avoid: stock-photo sterility, fake HDR glow halos, over-saturated Instagram filter look, blurry or deformed pedestrian faces, cluttered text placement that overlaps key subjects, generic skyline with no atmospheric depth
